title: Kunowsky
summary:
Kunowsky may refer to:

Georg Karl Friedrich Kunowsky (1786–1846), a German lawyer and amateur astronomer; and objects named after him:
Kunowsky (lunar crater)
Kunowsky (Martian crater)
